description: Rename route from /dashboard to /app throughout the application and create /app/home as the new default landing page with ProviderTopology visualization
steps: Step 1: Rename the filesystem route group. Move src/app/(dashboard)/dashboard/ to src/app/(dashboard)/app/. The route group (dashboard) stays as the layout wrapper but the URL-visible segment changes from 'dashboard' to 'app'.
Step 2: Update src/app/page.ts to redirect to /app instead of /dashboard.
Step 3: Add a redirect in next.config.ts from /dashboard/:path* to /app/:path* for backward compatibility.
Step 4: Update ALL navigation constants in src/shared/constants/dashboardNavigation.ts - change every /dashboard reference to /app (nav items, static page info, breadcrumbs, match functions, etc).
Step 5: Update src/shared/components/sidebar/SidebarNav.tsx - change the /dashboard/translator filter reference to /app/translator.
Step 6: Update src/shared/components/sidebar/SidebarMediaSection.tsx - change the /dashboard/media-providers references to /app/media-providers.
Step 7: Update src/shared/components/UsageStats.tsx - change fallbackPath from /dashboard/usage to /app/usage.
Step 8: Update src/app/(dashboard)/app/endpoint/EndpointPageClient.tsx - change fallbackPath from /dashboard to /app.
Step 9: Update all landing page components (Footer.tsx, Navigation.tsx, GetStarted.tsx, page.tsx) - change /dashboard references to /app.
Step 10: Create new page src/app/(dashboard)/app/home/page.tsx as a server component that renders a ProviderTopologyClient.

Step 11: Create src/app/(dashboard)/app/home/ProviderTopologyClient.tsx - a 'use client' component featuring a ReactFlow topology visualization. Use @xyflow/react with the existing ProviderNode pattern from src/app/(dashboard)/app/usage/components/ProviderTopology.tsx as a reference. Central node labeled 'AxonRouter'. Provider nodes show icon, name, and status (active/error/idle). Include summary cards for total providers, active connections, total requests. Use TanStack React Query with fetchJson pattern for data fetching from /api/providers. Style with shadcn/ui Card components and Tailwind CSS only - NO OmniRoute CSS variables.
Step 12: Update src/app/(dashboard)/app/page.tsx to redirect to /app/home instead of rendering the EndpointPageClient directly. The endpoint page will remain accessible at /app/endpoint.
Step 13: Add /app/home to navigation - add it as the FIRST item in DASHBOARD_PRIMARY_NAV_ITEMS with icon 'home' and label 'Home'.
Step 14: Add a DASHBOARD_STATIC_PAGE_INFO entry for /app/home with title 'Home' and description 'Provider topology overview'.
Step 15: Update the isDashboardNavItemActive function to handle /app/home correctly (exact match, not startsWith).
Step 16: Grep the entire src/ directory for any remaining '/dashboard' string references and fix them all.
acceptance_criteria: All /dashboard URL references throughout src/ are changed to /app
src/app/(dashboard)/app/ directory exists with all the previous dashboard pages
src/app/(dashboard)/app/home/page.tsx exists and renders the ProviderTopology page
next.config.ts contains backward-compat redirect from /dashboard to /app
